Bug Title: password field doesn't accept different letter cases
Steps to Reproduce:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid username 
3- enter valid password with different letter cases
4- click login button
Expected Result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the home page
Actual Result: user can't login an error message is displayed "Invalid credentials"

Bug Title: an invalid username is accepted when reset password and no error message is displayed
Steps to Reproduce:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- click forgot password button
3- enter invalid username "one character"
4- click reset password button
Expected Result: system shows error message "username not found"
Actual Result: user is redirected to confirmation reset password page and a confirmation reset password message is displayed

Bug Title: special characters is accepted in username when reset password and no error message is displayed
Steps to Reproduce:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- click forgot password button
3- enter invalid username "special characters"
4- click reset password button
Expected Result: an error message is displayed"invalid data"
Actual Result: user is redirected to confirmation reset password page and a confirmation reset password message is displayed

Bug Title: a new employee is created successfully after entering invalid data in all fields
Steps to Reproduce:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid data in all login fields
3- click PIM button from the left sidebar
4- enter invalid first name
5- enter invalid middle name
6- enter invalid last name
7- enter invalid employee ID
8- click save button"
Expected Result: an error message is displayed"invalid data"
Actual Result: user is created successfully and no error message is displayed

Bug Title: Username field in "Create Login Details" incorrectly accepts numeric-only values.
Steps to Reproduce:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid data in all login fields
3- click PIM button from the left sidebar
4- toggle 'Create Login Details' to ON.
5- enter an invalid username."numeric"
6- keep 'Status' selected as 'Enabled'.
7- enter an valid password and match it in 'Confirm Password'.
8- click Save."
Expected Result: an error message is displayed"invalid data"
Actual Result: user is created successfully and no error message is displayed
